schema.siteDescription: Build your own malatang bowl in Liège — herbal broth cooked to order

home.title: __BRAND__ - Malatang in Liège
home.description: Build your own herbal-broth bowl, fresh and made for you. Happiness in every bowl. Yangguofu Malatang in Liège.

menu.description: Discover our malatang bowls, signature broths, noodles and starters

contact.description: Visit us or give us a call! Rue de la Cathédrale 51, Liège, Belgium

hero.subtitle: Malatang: your herbal broth bowl, built by you, cooked to order, served steaming hot.
hero.bowl_alt: Malatang bowl with beef bone broth and fresh ingredients

broths.label: Our signatures
broths.title: Our signature broths
broths.subtitle: Five flavours, one promise: fresh ingredients, broth prepared daily.

beef_bone.name: Classic Herbal Beef Bone Broth
beef_bone.desc: Our signature since 2003: beef bones simmered for 8 hours with more than 20 oriental herbs. Pick your heat, from mild to extra spicy.
beef_bone.spice: Your choice: mild, spicy or extra spicy

tomato.name: Sweet & Sour Tomato Broth
tomato.desc: Fresh tomatoes slow-simmered, tangy and sweet at once. Gentle on the palate, and 100% plant-based.

mala_dry.name: Peanut Butter Spicy Dry Mix
mala_dry.desc: The broth-free exception: your ingredients coated in a fragrant sesame-peanut sauce. Addictive, gently spicy.

tom_yum.name: Thai Tom Yum Broth
tom_yum.desc: A Thai escape: sour, spicy, fragrant with lemongrass. A one-way ticket to Southeast Asia.

mushroom.name: Herbal Mushroom Broth
mushroom.desc: A gentle broth of mushrooms and herbs, without a hint of spice. Pure comfort, and 100% plant-based.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Four steps to the perfect bowl

step1.title: Choose
step1.desc: Browse the chilled counter and fill your bowl with the fresh ingredients you love.

step2.title: Weigh
step2.desc: Your bowl is weighed and the price appears. Transparent, no surprises.

step3.title: Tell us
step3.desc: Pick your broth and spice level: mild, medium, or hot.

step4.title: Enjoy
step4.desc: Your bowl is cooked to order in your chosen broth and served steaming hot.

video.label: Fresh, cooked to order
video.title: You build your bowl, we cook it fresh
video.subtitle: Veg, tofu, meat, noodles — pick whatever you fancy. Cooked to the minute in your broth, never fried.

stats.slogan: 幸福就在此刻 · Happiness in this very moment

broth.title: The herbal broth
broth.desc: Simmered in-house every day, so good you drink it by the spoonful.

fresh.title: Fresh & balanced
fresh.desc: Fresh produce, cooked to order. Never fried.

custom.title: Built by you
custom.desc: You choose everything, priced by the gram. Your taste, no surprises.

cta.title: Ready to build your bowl?
cta.subtitle: Pick your ingredients, we'll handle the rest.

concept.title: How it works
concept.subtitle: Four steps to the perfect bowl
concept.meta_desc: Discover the Yangguofu Malatang concept: build your bowl in 4 simple steps.

step1.title: Choose
step1.desc: Browse the chilled counter and fill your bowl with the fresh ingredients you love.

step2.title: Weigh
step2.desc: Your bowl is weighed and the price appears. Transparent, no surprises.

step3.title: Tell us
step3.desc: Pick your broth and spice level: mild, medium, or hot.

step4.title: Enjoy
step4.desc: Your bowl is cooked to order in your chosen broth and served steaming hot.

spicy.question: Is it spicy?
spicy.answer: You choose! Our beef bone broth comes in three heat levels: mild, spicy or extra spicy. Prefer no heat at all? The tomato and mushroom broths are perfectly gentle. The tom yum and the sesame-peanut dry mix are mildly spicy.

what.question: What is malatang?
what.answer: Malatang is a Chinese individual bowl concept: you pick your fresh ingredients at the counter, we cook them in a herbal broth. It's a balanced, personalised, comforting meal.

vegan.question: I'm vegetarian/vegan?
vegan.answer: Absolutely! Our counter offers many vegetables, mushrooms, tofu and noodles. You can build a 100% plant-based bowl. Ask us for details about our broths.

broth_story.title: The herbal broth
broth_story.p1: Since 2003, Yangguofu has perfected its beef bone broth infused with Chinese medicinal herbs. This is no ordinary broth: it's so smooth and rich it can be drunk on its own.
broth_story.p2: Every day, our chefs prepare the broth from fresh bones, carefully selected herbs, and a know-how passed down for over 20 years. It's the heart of the Yangguofu experience, and what sets us apart from any other malatang.
broth_story.p3: The secret? A unique marriage between Northern Chinese culinary tradition and modern nutritional techniques. The result: a comforting, balanced, and deeply flavourful broth.

menu.title: Our menu
menu.subtitle: Build your bowl to your taste: fresh ingredients, priced by weight.
menu.meta_desc: Yangguofu Malatang Liège menu: five broths and dozens of fresh ingredients at €3.49/100 g. By weight, transparent.
menu.ingredients_subtitle: All fresh, all your choice: build the bowl that's you.
menu.pricing_desc: At Yangguofu, there's no fixed price: you only pay for what you pick. Fill your bowl, we weigh it, the price is clear. Simple, transparent, fair.

newcomer.label: First time?
newcomer.title: Start with a classic bowl
newcomer.desc: Not sure where to begin? Grab a bowl, add a few vegetables, some tofu and noodles, then pick our herbal beef bone broth in its mild version. It's the perfect way into the world of malatang.

menu.veg_note: Vegetarian & vegan: build a 100% plant-based bowl with vegetables, mushrooms, tofu and noodles.
menu.price_tagline: You only pay for what you weigh.
menu.allergens_note: The 14 major (EU) allergens are listed for each broth. Questions? Just ask us at the counter.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: From Harbin to Liège, over 20 years of malatang passion.
about.meta_desc: The story of Yangguofu Malatang, from Harbin in 2003 to Liège today. 7000+ restaurants in 25+ countries.

2003.title: It all started in Harbin
2003.desc: Yang Guofu opens his first malatang stall in Harbin, northeast China. His secret recipe: a beef bone broth infused with Chinese medicinal herbs.

2007.title: A brand is born
2007.desc: The concept matures: Yangguofu Malatang becomes a registered trademark and begins its expansion across China.

2017.title: Going global
2017.desc: First restaurant outside China. The international adventure begins: Southeast Asia, North America, Europe.

2024.title: The rebrand
2024.desc: New orange identity, Gen.6 store concept. Yangguofu reinvents itself with 'Oriental Wellness Cuisine' as its vision.

liege.title: Liège, Belgium
liege.desc: Yangguofu arrives in Liège to bring you authentic malatang in a modern, warm setting.

origin.title: The origins
origin.text: In 2003, Yang Guofu launched his first malatang stall in Harbin, northeast China. His secret recipe: a beef bone broth infused with Chinese medicinal herbs.

craft.title: The craftsmanship
craft.text: Every day, our chefs prepare the broth from fresh bones and carefully selected herbs. A know-how passed down for over 20 years.

global.title: Global malatang
global.text: With over 7000 restaurants in 25 countries, Yangguofu brings malatang from Harbin to Liège, with the same passion everywhere.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Selected ingredients, broth prepared fresh daily. Never any compromise.

freshness.title: Freshness
freshness.desc: Everything is fresh, everything is visible: you see what you choose.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Pay by weight, open kitchen: nothing is hidden.

happiness.title: Happiness
happiness.desc: Happiness in every bowl. That's been our promise since 2003.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Come visit us or drop us a message.
contact.meta_desc: Contact Yangguofu Malatang Liège: address, opening hours, email and social media.
contact.email_intro: A question or a comment? Drop us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.
contact.phone_reservation: Reservations are taken by phone only.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.message: Looks like you got lost... But don't worry, a steaming bowl of malatang is waiting for you!
not_found.fuzi_alt: Fuzi, the Yangguofu mascot, enjoying a bowl of noodles

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you accept our privacy policy.

seo.home_desc: Build your own herbal broth bowl with fresh ingredients, at €3.49/100 g. Happiness in every bowl. Yangguofu Malatang in Liège.

what.question: What is malatang?
what.answer: Malatang is a Chinese individual bowl concept: you pick your fresh ingredients at the counter, we cook them in a herbal broth. It's a balanced, personalised, comforting meal.

spicy.question: Is it spicy?
spicy.answer: You choose! Our beef bone broth comes in three heat levels: mild, spicy or extra spicy. Prefer no heat at all? The tomato and mushroom broths are perfectly gentle. The tom yum and the sesame-peanut dry mix are mildly spicy.

vegan.question: I'm vegetarian/vegan?
vegan.answer: Absolutely! Our counter offers many vegetables, mushrooms, tofu and noodles. You can build a 100% plant-based bowl. Ask us for details about our broths.

hours.question: What are your opening hours?
hours.answer: We are open every day, Monday to Sunday, from 11:30 AM to 10:00 PM.

delivery.question: Do you deliver? What is the delivery area?
delivery.answer: For now, orders are takeaway only, from our restaurant at Rue de la Cathédrale 51, Liège. Delivery is coming soon!

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept secure online payment (bank card, Bancontact) and cash on delivery or pickup.

allergens.question: Do you have allergen information?
allergens.answer: Our dishes may contain sesame, peanuts, gluten, soy and shellfish. Please mention any allergy in your order comments or contact us directly for detailed information.
